arts.ttl: Chelsea midfield target is now ‘real option’ as last-minute deadline day signing - journalist
arts.sum: It looks as if a midfielder has emerged as the top target for Chelsea in the final hours of the January transfer window. The Blues...

arts.ttl: Joao Felix has already sent Tottenham six-word message after Spurs transfer 'interest'
arts.sum: Chelsea’s Joao Felix has already made his stance on joining Tottenham clear, as the north London side have reportedly shown an interest in raiding their rivals. Meanwhile, speaking in January, Maresca made it clear that Felix and Chelsea’s talisman, Cole Palmer, cannot play together.

arts.ttl: Joao Felix transfer latest as Aston Villa and Milan battle for Chelsea deal
arts.sum: So, with that being said, football.london has rounded up everything you need to know about Felix and his future at Chelsea. "We have decided to play with an attacking midfielder in most of the games, so this is the reason why Joao and Christo struggle to get minutes - not for any different reasons because they are both fantastic players, fantastic guys who work well.

arts.ttl: Enzo Fernandez drops early Chelsea team news hint as Enzo Maresca explains Robert Sanchez decision
arts.sum: Enzo Fernandez and Noni Madueke have dropped early team news hints ahead of Chelsea's clash against West Ham. The Blues will host the Hammers at Stamford Bridge on Monday evening as they both look to climb the Premier League table . Nevertheless, Fernandez and Madueke have posted pre-match graphic previews of the West Ham fixture to their respective Instagram stories.

arts.ttl: ‘Deal there to be done’: Journalist says £60m player could still sign for Chelsea
arts.sum: It wouldn’t be a transfer deadline day if there wasn’t some movement at Chelsea. The Blues are always busy towards the end of a transfer...

arts.ttl: Sources: Chelsea's Chilwell set for Palace loan
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are set to sign Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell on loan for the rest of the season, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Manchester United are PRICED OUT of Christopher Nkunku transfer, amid a huge difference in his valuation with Chelsea - with French star set to stay
arts.sum: Nkunku has scored 16 goals in 43 first-team appearances for the Blues, including 13 in 29 under Enzo Maresca this season. He cost Chelsea £53m when he joined from RB Leipzig in June 2023.

arts.ttl: Christopher Nkunku set to stay at Chelsea
arts.sum: Chelsea striker Christopher Nkunku (27) is expected to stay with the Blues and not pursue a deadline-day move, according to The Athletic’s David Ornstein. The France international was touted with…

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Chilwell set for Crystal Palace loan
arts.sum: Chelsea defender Ben Chilwell is set to join Premier League rivals Crystal Palace on loan for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho to Chelsea: Deal close as Fabrizio Romano confirms interest in Man Utd ace
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to make a last-gasp bid to sign Alejandro Garnacho from Manchester United on Deadline Day. Garnacho to Chelsea: Deal close as Romano confirms interest in Man Utd ace
